query:
-- ดู contract_no ตัวอย่างของแต่ละ section
SELECT section, MIN(contract_no) as min_no, MAX(contract_no) as max_no, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contracts GROUP BY section;
stdout:

Boonphone	CT0125-AYA001-6949-02	CT1225-UTT004-20286-01	17809
